_usage: Add alongside token_budget in GSI_SPRINT_MANIFEST.json. Log each optimisation decision.
_types: parallelise | batch | split | read_avoidance | scope_narrow | defer

_quality_floors.parallelise: CTO must Read agent output before committing — not just run regression
_quality_floors.batch: Only for doc-only changes (*.md, *.json config). Never batch code files.
_quality_floors.split: Sub-items committed independently; B cannot start until A regression passes
_quality_floors.read_avoidance: BANNED for files being edited. Grep/Glob only for files searched but not modified.
_quality_floors.scope_narrow: Agent prompt must include: file path, target function, relevant CLAUDE.md scoped rules
_quality_floors.defer: Deferred items must be added to GSI_SPRINT.md backlog in the same session

token_optimisations.type: parallelise | batch | split | read_avoidance | scope_narrow | defer
token_optimisations.detail: what was done and what alternative was rejected
